input.voice_sample: Institutional observer voice — dry wit, formal-adjacent, pre-emptively acknowledges objections, refuses to conclude, uses 'I' as measurement device not emotional center
input.new_topic: Open-plan offices and why the design failed every experiment it was supposed to validate

test_cases.notes: Voice analysis extracts specific rules, not adjectives. New passage maintains the dry institutional voice throughout. Characteristic pattern (state → acknowledge objection → restate) is present. Ending refuses to conclude correctly. Excellent adaptation.

input.voice_sample: Warm, confessional first-person voice. Short sentences. Food and family intertwined. Uses sensory detail to carry emotional weight. Mediterranean background implied rather than explained. Rarely uses 'because' — cause and effect are implied.
input.new_topic: The ritual of Sunday cooking and what gets lost when it disappears from a family

test_cases.notes: Voice analysis correctly identifies implied causation pattern. New passage uses sensory detail (smell, physical action) rather than explanation. Emotional weight carried by scene, not statement. Consistent warm register throughout.

input.voice_sample: Short sample, 90 words: blunt, data-forward, skeptical of consensus. No rhetorical questions. Ends on a fact, not a flourish.
input.new_topic: Why productivity app downloads spike in January and whether they produce any measurable change

test_cases.notes: Short voice sample (90 words, below recommended 150) — skill correctly flags insufficient pattern repetition in analysis. Output is blunt and data-forward as described, but two sentences slip into mild rhetorical phrasing not in the sample. Acceptable given data constraint. Passes threshold.
